message:
🐛 Fix light-mode visibility in logs, bug report preview, enterprise page (#10513 #10516 #10517) (#10521)

- LogsDrillDown: replace bg-black/50 + text-green-400 with bg-card + text-foreground
- ghmd CSS: replace hardcoded hex colors (#e6edf3, #30363d, #161b22) with CSS variables
- EnterprisePortal: replace bg-gray-900, text-white, border-gray-800 with semantic classes
- EnterpriseLayout: replace bg-gray-950 text-white with bg-background text-foreground
- ComingSoon: replace text-white, text-gray-400/600 with text-foreground, text-muted-foreground

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
